top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM users u
WHERE u.Location = 'United Kingdom'
AND u.Id IN (
    SELECT p.OwnerUserId
    FROM posts p
    GROUP BY p.OwnerUserId
    HAVING SUM(p.FavoriteCount) >= 4
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE u.Location LIKE '%United Kingdom%'
GROUP BY u.Id
HAVING SUM(p.FavoriteCount) >= 4;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM users u
WHERE u.Location = 'United Kingdom'
AND u.Id IN (
    SELECT p.OwnerUserId
    FROM posts p
    GROUP BY p.OwnerUserId
    HAVING SUM(p.FavoriteCount) >= 4
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.Id) 
FROM users u
INNER JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE u.Location = 'United Kingdom'
GROUP BY u.Id
HAVING SUM(p.FavoriteCount) >= 4;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE u.Location LIKE '%United Kingdom%'
GROUP BY u.Id
HAVING SUM(p.FavoriteCount) >= 4;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM users u
WHERE u.Location = 'United Kingdom'
AND u.Id IN (
    SELECT p.OwnerUserId
    FROM posts p
    GROUP BY p.OwnerUserId
    HAVING SUM(p.FavoriteCount) >= 4
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT u.Id
    FROM users u
    INNER JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    WHERE u.Location = 'United Kingdom'
    GROUP BY u.Id
    HAVING SUM(p.FavoriteCount) >= 4
) AS qualified_users;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.Id) 
FROM users u
INNER JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE u.Location = 'United Kingdom'
GROUP BY u.Id
HAVING SUM(p.FavoriteCount) >= 4;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM users u
WHERE u.Location = 'United Kingdom'
AND u.Id IN (
    SELECT p.OwnerUserId
    FROM posts p
    GROUP BY p.OwnerUserId
    HAVING SUM(p.FavoriteCount) >= 4
);
